ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the city */,
  "db_city" TEXT /* Database name of the city */,
  "avg_latitude" REAL /* Average latitude of the city */,
  "avg_longitude" REAL /* Average longitude of the city */,
  "city_area" REAL /* Area of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the business category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business category */,
  "parent_category" TEXT /* Parent category of the business category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the business category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the data is collected */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business category */,
  "pr_1" INTEGER /* Number of businesses in the first period */,
  "rv_1" INTEGER /* Revenue of businesses in the first period */,
  "pr_2" INTEGER /* Number of businesses in the second period */,
  "rv_2" INTEGER /* Revenue of businesses in the second period */,
  "pr_3" INTEGER /* Number of businesses in the third period */,
  "rv_3" INTEGER /* Revenue of businesses in the third period */,
  "pr_4" INTEGER /* Number of businesses in the fourth period */,
  "rv_4" INTEGER /* Revenue of businesses in the fourth period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES business_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "avg_latitude" REAL /* Average latitude of the city */,
  "avg_longitude" REAL /* Average longitude of the city */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Boundary of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, urban planner, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES business_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business license */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business category */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the license (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_licenses_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_licenses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES business_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the business owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the business owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership entry */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business license */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business owner */,
  "ownership_percentage" REAL /* Ownership percentage of the business owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_ownership_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES business_licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_ownership_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES business_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business license */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the revenue data */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the revenue data */,
  "revenue_amount" REAL /* Amount of revenue */,
  "revenue_source" TEXT /* Source of the revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_revenue_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES business_licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_location" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business license */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the business location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the business location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_location_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES business_licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business license */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the user */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_reviews_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES business_licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint entry */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business license */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who filed the complaint */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was filed */,
  "complaint_description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_complaints_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_complaints_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES business_licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business license */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_awards_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES business_licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification entry */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business license */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the certification was obtained */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_certifications_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES business_licenses ("license_id")
)
